all.en: Greenpath Holdings is pleased to publish its tenth annual sustainability report.
all.zh: Greenpath 控股很高興發布第十份年度永續報告書。

all.en: This document outlines our environmental, social, and governance performance for the past year.
all.zh: 本報告概述本公司過去一年的環境、社會與治理表現。

all.en: We continue to align our reporting with internationally recognized frameworks and standards.
all.zh: 我們持續使報告與國際公認的框架與準則對齊。

all.en: Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions declined by 17 percent versus the baseline year.
all.zh: 範疇一與範疇二排放較基準年下降百分之十七。

all.en: Renewable electricity now accounts for 62 percent of our total energy consumption.
all.zh: 再生電力目前佔我們總能源消耗的百分之六十二。

all.en: Three additional manufacturing sites achieved zero waste to landfill certification.
all.zh: 另有三座製造廠取得零廢棄物掩埋認證。

all.en: Water withdrawal in high-stress regions was reduced by nearly 22 percent.
all.zh: 水資源壓力區的取水量減少近百分之二十二。

all.en: We invested 28 million dollars in energy efficiency upgrades across global operations.
all.zh: 我們在全球營運據點投資兩千八百萬美元進行能源效率升級。

all.en: Our supplier code of conduct was updated to strengthen human rights provisions.
all.zh: 我們的供應商行為準則已更新，強化人權相關條款。

all.en: Eighty-five percent of tier-one suppliers completed independent sustainability audits.
all.zh: 百分之八十五的一階供應商完成獨立的永續性稽核。

all.en: Female representation on the board of directors increased to 45 percent.
all.zh: 董事會中女性代表比例提升至百分之四十五。

all.en: We expanded our paid parental leave policy to all employees worldwide.
all.zh: 我們將有薪育嬰假政策擴及全球所有員工。

all.en: Lost-time injury frequency decreased for the fifth consecutive year.
all.zh: 失工傷害頻率連續第五年下降。

all.en: Employee engagement scores reached a record high of 82 percent.
all.zh: 員工敬業度分數達歷史新高百分之八十二。

all.en: We contributed over 5 million dollars to community education and disaster relief programs.
all.zh: 我們捐助超過五百萬美元於社區教育與救災計畫。

all.en: A new product stewardship program covers 70 percent of total product revenue.
all.zh: 新的產品管理計畫涵蓋總產品營收的百分之七十。

all.en: Packaging recyclability across our portfolio rose to 91 percent this year.
all.zh: 今年我們產品組合的包裝可回收率提升至百分之九十一。

all.en: Climate risks and opportunities are now integrated into enterprise risk management.
all.zh: 氣候風險與機會現已納入企業風險管理之中。

all.en: Independent assurance was obtained for all material environmental indicators disclosed.
all.zh: 所有揭露的重大環境指標均已取得獨立保證意見。

all.en: We remain committed to achieving net zero emissions by the year 2040.
all.zh: 我們仍致力於在二零四零年前達成淨零排放。

all.en: Short-term targets will be revalidated through the Science Based Targets initiative.
all.zh: 短期目標將透過科學基礎減量目標倡議重新驗證。

all.en: Stakeholder feedback continues to inform the evolution of our reporting priorities.
all.zh: 利害關係人的回饋持續引導我們報告重點的演進。

all.en: Detailed performance tables and methodology notes appear in the report appendices.
all.zh: 詳細績效表格與方法論說明請見報告附錄。

all.en: We invite readers to share comments through our dedicated sustainability mailbox.
all.zh: 我們邀請讀者透過專屬永續信箱分享意見。
